headline: Broadcom Extends AI Story With Arcot Smart Ruleset In Payments
summary: Broadcom (NasdaqGS:AVGO) has introduced the Arcot Smart Ruleset, a machine learning driven, adaptive fraud detection product for payment security. The launch marks Broadcom's first major push into AI powered 3-D Secure solutions beyond its core chip business. The product is aimed at helping financial institutions tackle digital fraud at scale while aligning with evolving regulatory standards. For you as an investor, this is a new angle on Broadcom's AI story that sits outside the usual...

headline: Google Broadcom Chip Deal Puts Intel AI Foundry Goals Under Scrutiny
summary: Google is expanding its custom chip partnership with Broadcom, testing Intel's efforts to grow its AI focused foundry and custom silicon business. The shift affects one of Intel's key hyperscale relationships at a time when the company is highlighting progress in AI manufacturing and large projects such as Terafab. Investors are watching how this development fits into Intel's long term foundry roadmap and its position in advanced custom AI chips. Intel (NasdaqGS:INTC) enters this news cycle...

headline: Is Broadcom (AVGO) Pricing In Too Much After Its 139% One Year Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Broadcom's current share price lines up with its underlying value, this breakdown will help you frame the numbers in a clear way. The stock has seen sharp moves recently, with returns of 5.6% over 7 days, 29.5% over 30 days, 15.7% year to date and 139.1% over the past year, as well as a very large 3 year return and an even larger 5 year return.
